globalProperty.value: SELECT pi.identifier, concat(pn.given_name, ' ', ifnull(pn.family_name,'')) AS "Name", concat("", p.uuid) AS uuid, concat("", v.uuid) AS activeVisitUuid, concat("", ma.uuid) AS medicationAdministrationUuid, IFNULL(d.name, dr.name) AS "Drug Name", latest_note.text AS "Amended Note", concat(ppn.given_name, ' ', ifnull(ppn.family_name,'')) AS "Amend Author", DATE_FORMAT(latest_note.recorded_time, "%d %b %Y %h:%i %p") AS "Amended Date/Time", UNIX_TIMESTAMP(ma.administered_date_time) * 1000 as "medicationAdministrationEpoch" FROM ( SELECT man1.medication_administration_id, man1.uuid as note_uuid, man1.text, man1.recorded_time, man1.author_id FROM medication_administration_note man1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT medication_administration_id, MAX(recorded_time) as max_recorded_time FROM medication_administration_note WHERE amendment_reason IS NOT NULL AND text IS NOT NULL AND recorded_time = GREATEST(recorded_time, DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)) GROUP BY medication_administration_id ) man2 ON man1.medication_administration_id = man2.medication_administration_id AND man1.recorded_time = man2.max_recorded_time WHERE man1.amendment_reason IS NOT NULL AND man1.text IS NOT NULL ) latest_note INNER JOIN medication_administration ma ON ma.medication_administration_id = latest_note.medication_administration_id AND ma.voided IS FALSE INNER JOIN ipd_slot ist ON ma.medication_administration_id = ist.medication_administration_id AND ist.voided IS FALSE INNER JOIN ipd_schedule ips ON ist.schedule_id = ips.schedule_id AND ips.voided IS FALSE INNER JOIN visit v ON ips.visit_id = v.visit_id AND v.voided IS FALSE AND v.date_stopped IS NULL LEFT JOIN fhir_reference fr ON fr.target_uuid = latest_note.note_uuid LEFT JOIN fhir_task ft ON ft.for_reference_id = fr.reference_id AND ft.name = 'ACKNOWLEDGE_MEDICATION_NOTE' AND ft.status = 'COMPLETED' INNER JOIN patient_identifier pi ON ma.patient_id = pi.patient_id AND pi.voided IS FALSE AND pi.preferred IS TRUE INNER JOIN person p ON ma.patient_id = p.person_id AND p.voided IS FALSE INNER JOIN person_name pn ON ma.patient_id = pn.person_id AND pn.voided IS FALSE AND pn.preferred IS TRUE INNER JOIN provider pr ON latest_note.author_id = pr.provider_id INNER JOIN person pp ON pr.person_id = pp.person_id AND pp.voided IS FALSE INNER JOIN person_name ppn ON pp.person_id = ppn.person_id AND ppn.voided IS FALSE LEFT JOIN drug d ON ma.drug_id = d.drug_id LEFT JOIN drug_order do ON ma.drug_order_id = do.order_id LEFT JOIN drug dr ON do.drug_inventory_id = dr.drug_id WHERE ft.task_id IS NULL ORDER BY latest_note.recorded_time ASC;
globalProperty.description: Sql query to get list of medication administration notes that needs to be Acknowledged
